subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Bear thou witness in thine inmost heart that verily there is no God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Conquering, the Unassailable, and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ان اشهدی فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو العزیز الغالب المنیع و ان
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
